$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file.

name.description: The exact name of the package on pub.dev

reason.description: Why this package should be avoided.

as_of.description: The date this issue was recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

replacement.description: The recommended package to use instead, or null if none exists.

migrationNotes.description: Steps required to move away from this package.

archiveSizeBytes.description: Archive size in bytes from pub.dev.

archiveSizeMB.description: Archive size in megabytes (derived from archiveSizeBytes).

license.description: The SPDX license identifier for the package (e.g. MIT, BSD-3-Clause).

lastUpdated.description: The date the package was last published on pub.dev (YYYY-MM-DD).

pubPoints.description: The pub.dev points score for the package.

wasmReady.description: Whether the package supports WASM compilation.

verifiedPublisher.description: Whether the package publisher is verified on pub.dev.

platforms.description: The platforms supported by the package.

overrideReason.description: Why a dependency_overrides pin is needed despite no version conflict.

replacementObsoleteFromVersion.description: Do not show replacement when user's version >= this value (semver string).

appliesToMinVersion.description: Minimum version this issue applies to (semver, inclusive). When absent, no lower bound.

appliesToMaxVersion.description: Maximum version this issue applies to (semver, exclusive). When absent, no upper bound.
